name: codex-worker
description: Codex-backed local implementation and review worker for bounded repository tasks.

skills.name: Research then implement
skills.description: Use Sovereign Search for public implementation discovery, then implement in a local worktree and return diff and test artifacts.

skills.name: Implement
skills.description: Implement a bounded task in a workspace using codex exec and return a structured result.

skills.name: Review diff
skills.description: Review a supplied diff or workspace change set for correctness, tests, and maintainability.
